spec_match.rationale: Uses complex CSS Value calculations with oklch() colors, rotate transforms, and fallback properties to match the specification.

interactive.rationale: Two separate interactive sliders demonstrate both dynamic delta changes and linear positioning differences.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfectly aligns with the blurb describing the twelve coordinated outputs driven by one/two properties.

edge_cases.rationale: Outstanding fallback strategy that manually computes abs/sign in JS for older browsers, guaranteeing visual presentation.

references.rationale: Cites both ChromeStatus feature entry and official W3C CSS Value math draft.

design_system.rationale: Correctly applies standard design system styling variables for consistency.

summary: An excellent, highly robust demonstration of CSS abs() and sign() in action. It maps input custom properties to oklch dynamic color shifting, arrow rotations, and relative ball translations with an exceptional Javascript fallback math block to support older browsers.
